mapper.insert: insert into t_user (username, password, real_name, role, class_id, create_time, update_time, avatar) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{role}, #{classId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{avatar});
mapper.select:
select tu.id, tu.username, tu.real_name, tu.role, tu.class_id, tu.create_time, tu.update_time, tu.avatar, tc.class_name, tc.id from t_user tu left join t_class tc on tu.class_id = tc.id
tu.class_id in
#{classId}
and tu.real_name like concat('%', #{studentQueryDTO.realName}, '%')
order by tu.update_time desc, tu.id desc
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_user
real_name = #{realName},
username = #{username},
class_id = #{classId},
update_time = NOW(),
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: select tc.id as classId, tc.class_name, tc.major, tc.create_time, tc.update_time, tu.id as teacherId, tu.role, tu.real_name as teacherName from t_class tc join t_class_teacher_relation tctr on tc.id = tctr.class_id join t_user tu on tctr.teacher_id = tu.id where tc.id = #{classId}
